family_movie_night.description: Fast family-friendly picks for a seasonal anchor (DD.MM) using family-oriented genre buckets
family_movie_night.sql: select movie_title as title, release_year as year, genres as genre, weighted_clickouts_29d_sum as score, 'Family-friendly seasonal popularity' as reason, poster_jw, url_imdb, url_tmdb from marts.mart_movie_popularity_seasonal_ddmm_top20 where app_locale = %s and anchor_ddmm = %s and genre_bucket in ('FamilyAnimation', 'ComedyFamily', 'Family') order by weighted_clickouts_29d_sum desc, window_rank asc limit %s

recommendations_by_genre.description: Top recommendations for a genre bucket at a seasonal anchor (DD.MM) (single-genre or curated bucket like RomCom)
recommendations_by_genre.sql: select movie_title as title, release_year as year, genres as genre, weighted_clickouts_29d_sum as score, poster_jw, url_imdb, url_tmdb from marts.mart_movie_popularity_seasonal_ddmm_top20 where app_locale = %s and anchor_ddmm = %s and genre_bucket = %s order by window_rank limit %s

recommendations_by_mood.description: Mood-based recommendations using a simple mood→genre_bucket mapping on the seasonal popularity mart (DD.MM)
recommendations_by_mood.sql: with mood_bucket as (select case lower(%s) when 'romantic' then 'RomCom' when 'funny' then 'Comedy' when 'scary' then 'HorrorThriller' when 'action' then 'ActionAdventure' when 'family' then 'FamilyAnimation' when 'cozy' then 'ComedyFamily' when 'thrilling' then 'CrimeThriller' when 'mystery' then 'MysteryThriller' else '__all__' end as genre_bucket) select m.movie_title as title, m.release_year as year, %s as mood, m.weighted_clickouts_29d_sum as score, m.poster_jw, m.url_imdb, m.url_tmdb from marts.mart_movie_popularity_seasonal_ddmm_top20 m cross join mood_bucket b where m.app_locale = %s and m.anchor_ddmm = %s and m.genre_bucket = b.genre_bucket order by m.window_rank limit %s

similar_movies.description: Movies similar to a given movie (by object_id) using genre overlap, sourced from seasonal popularity candidates (DD.MM)
similar_movies.sql: with src as (select %s as source_object_id), src_genres as (select distinct lower(g.genre) as genre from intermediate.int_bridge_title_genres g join src s on g.object_id = s.source_object_id), candidate_ids as (select object_id from marts.mart_movie_popularity_seasonal_ddmm_top20 where app_locale = %s and anchor_ddmm = %s and genre_bucket = '__all__' union all select m.object_id from marts.mart_movie_popularity_seasonal_ddmm_top20 m join (select distinct g.genre from intermediate.int_bridge_title_genres g join src s on g.object_id = s.source_object_id) sg on m.genre_bucket = sg.genre where m.app_locale = %s and m.anchor_ddmm = %s), candidates as (select distinct object_id from candidate_ids), overlap as (select c.object_id, count(distinct sg.genre) as overlap_count from candidates c join intermediate.int_bridge_title_genres cg on c.object_id = cg.object_id join src_genres sg on lower(cg.genre) = sg.genre group by 1), scored as (select m.object_id, m.movie_title as recommended_title, m.release_year as year, m.genres as genre, (o.overlap_count / nullif((select count(*) from src_genres), 0))::float as similarity_score, m.poster_jw, m.url_imdb, m.url_tmdb from overlap o join marts.mart_movie_popularity_seasonal_ddmm_top20 m on o.object_id = m.object_id where m.app_locale = %s and m.anchor_ddmm = %s and m.genre_bucket = '__all__') select * from scored where object_id != %s order by similarity_score desc nulls last, year desc nulls last limit %s

personalized_recommendations.description: Personalized movie recommendations for a user based on their recent clickout genre mix + seasonal popularity (DD.MM)
personalized_recommendations.sql: with user_params as (select %s as user_id, %s as app_locale, %s::date as start_date, %s::date as end_date), user_genres as (select lower(g.genre) as genre, count(*) as user_clickouts_in_genre from marts.fct_clickouts c join intermediate.int_bridge_title_genres g on c.title_jw_entity_id = g.object_id join user_params p on c.user_id = p.user_id and c.app_locale = p.app_locale and c.event_date between p.start_date and p.end_date group by 1 qualify row_number() over (order by user_clickouts_in_genre desc, genre) <= 3), recs as (select m.object_id, m.movie_title as title, m.release_year as year, m.genres as genre, m.weighted_clickouts_29d_sum as score, 'Popular around ' || %s || ' and matches your genre: ' || ug.genre as reason, m.poster_jw, m.url_imdb, m.url_tmdb from marts.mart_movie_popularity_seasonal_ddmm_top20 m join user_genres ug on lower(m.genre_bucket) = ug.genre where m.app_locale = %s and m.anchor_ddmm = %s) select * from recs order by score desc, year desc nulls last limit %s

top_movies_seasonal_across_years.description: Top movies for a recurring seasonal day+month (DD.MM) aggregated across all years (e.g., Xmas across years)
top_movies_seasonal_across_years.sql: select movie_title, weighted_clickouts_29d_sum, window_rank, years_covered, poster_jw, url_imdb, url_tmdb from marts.mart_movie_popularity_seasonal_ddmm_top20 where app_locale = %s and anchor_ddmm = %s and genre_bucket = %s order by window_rank limit %s

top_movies_around_date.description: Top movies around a specific calendar date (±14 days), ranked with triangular weighting (best for 'Xmas 2025' prompts)
top_movies_around_date.sql: select movie_title, weighted_clickouts_29d, window_rank, poster_jw, url_imdb, url_tmdb from marts.mart_movie_popularity_rolling_29d_top20 where app_locale = %s and anchor_date = %s and genre_bucket = %s order by window_rank limit %s

top_movies_around_date_by_keyword.description: Top movies around a date with a keyword match in title/description (simple text match)
top_movies_around_date_by_keyword.sql: select movie_title, weighted_clickouts_29d, window_rank, poster_jw, url_imdb, url_tmdb from marts.mart_movie_popularity_rolling_29d_top20 where app_locale = %s and anchor_date = %s and genre_bucket = '__all__' and (movie_title ilike '%%' || %s || '%%' or short_description ilike '%%' || %s || '%%' or object_text_short_description ilike '%%' || %s || '%%' or genres ilike '%%' || %s || '%%') order by weighted_clickouts_29d desc limit %s

daily_trending_movies.description: Daily trending movies for a specific day (top 50 per day/market, unweighted)
daily_trending_movies.sql: select movie_title, clickouts, daily_rank, poster_jw, url_imdb, url_tmdb from marts.mart_movie_popularity_daily_top50 where app_locale = %s and event_date = %s order by daily_rank limit %s

seasonal_window_recommendations_for_date.description: Curated seasonal-window recommendations for a given search_date (genre + keyword scoring, not telemetry-based)
seasonal_window_recommendations_for_date.sql: select start_date, until_date, period_description, title, release_year, imdb_score, runtime, poster_jw, url_imdb, matched_genre_count, matched_keyword_count, matched_genres, matched_keywords, total_score, object_text_short_description, short_description from marts.mart_seasonal_window_movie_recommendations_top10 where %s between start_date and until_date order by window_rank limit %s

movie_details_by_object_id.description: Fetch movie details (description, poster, external URLs) by JustWatch object_id (tm...)
movie_details_by_object_id.sql: select object_id, title as movie_title, original_title, translated_title, release_year, imdb_score, short_description, object_text_short_description, poster_jw, url_imdb, url_tmdb from marts.dim_titles where object_id = %s and object_type = 'movie' limit 1

search_movies_by_keyword.description: Search movies by keyword in title/description (fast catalog lookup for chatbot)
search_movies_by_keyword.sql: select object_id, title as movie_title, release_year, imdb_score, runtime, poster_jw, url_imdb, url_tmdb from marts.dim_titles where object_type = 'movie' and (title ilike '%%' || %s || '%%' or original_title ilike '%%' || %s || '%%' or translated_title ilike '%%' || %s || '%%' or short_description ilike '%%' || %s || '%%' or object_text_short_description ilike '%%' || %s || '%%') order by imdb_score desc nulls last, release_year desc nulls last limit %s

top_movies_in_date_range.description: Top movies in a date range (unweighted, full-fact scan; use when you want exact totals beyond the pre-ranked marts)
top_movies_in_date_range.sql: select t.title as movie_title, c.title_jw_entity_id as object_id, count(*) as clickouts, count(distinct c.user_id) as unique_users, count(distinct c.session_id) as unique_sessions from marts.fct_clickouts c join marts.dim_titles t on c.title_jw_entity_id = t.object_id where c.app_locale = %s and c.event_date between %s and %s and t.object_type = 'movie' group by 1, 2 order by clickouts desc limit %s

top_providers_in_date_window.description: Top streaming providers by clickouts in a date window (useful for 'where are people watching around Xmas?')
top_providers_in_date_window.sql: select p.clear_name as provider_name, c.clickout_monetization_type as monetization_type, count(*) as clickouts from marts.fct_clickouts c join marts.dim_providers p on c.clickout_provider_id = p.id where c.app_locale = %s and c.event_date between %s and %s group by 1, 2 order by clickouts desc limit %s
